sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Replaced the separate 'Expand all mediums' and 'Collapse all mediums' buttons with a single toggle button. The two originals are hidden (not removed) and delegated to via .click() so MB's own expand/collapse logic is reused unchanged. The orphan ' | ' text node between the two hidden buttons is removed to prevent a double-separator from appearing. Initial label ('Collapse all mediums' / 'Expand all mediums') reflects the actual expansion state via getComputedStyle on the first medium tbody.

sections.label: 🎉 Release
items: Initial release. Based on ROpdebee's mb_qol_inline_recording_tracks (v2025.5.3). Adds a toggle button in span#medium-toolbox: first click fetches and displays 'appears on' track info for all recordings on the page (div.ars.ROpdebee_inline_tracks blocks); subsequent clicks alternately hide and show the already-fetched data without re-fetching. Button label switches between 'Display track info for recordings' and 'Hide track info for recordings'.
